{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032118255410A2DE2C0A0DF2A6F8D7"}"},"total":19404},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7239459928716329740","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"别具风格的一本书，终于读完了，感谢作者让读者有了另一番人生感悟。每个人的思维跟处事方式不同，所以看到的世界也不一样，这本书让我耳目一新。写书如做人，作者的三观很正，创作思路清晰，文笔精炼流畅，毫不拖泥带水，人物性格鲜明，喜欢这本书，更喜欢作者。[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685568532,"group_id":"7085357205842562078","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N84iihMLX3tBlX7XuRKQSLmJW4spWdBdMJjnSy/JM8Le","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3281423524696408","user_name":"丹枫白露宫的亲骨肉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3281423524696408","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7085357205842562078","book_info":{"abstract":"【凡人流】【无系统】与传统仙侠写法不同，不喜勿入
那一年，七岁的男孩儿带着妹妹踏入了修仙界，然后，修仙的全疯了！
　　出来修仙，你天赋好不好，宝贝多不多，有没有机缘，这些都不重要，但你一定要记住，有一个人你不能惹。
　　虽然这个人并不是什么修仙之人。
　　但是他的刀，比光还快，快到你根本来不及调动灵力。
　　他的拳，比天还重，重的可以一拳让这个世界停止自转。
　　他的嘴，比我还贱，贱的可以让烈阳流泪，让皎月燃烧。
　　他是谁？他是一个没有修仙天赋，却在修仙界练武的靓仔。
　　多年以后，修仙界一众大佬们问他:“林大靓仔，你一个练武的为啥非要跑到修仙界呢？”
　　少年笑嘻嘻的回答道:“我只是没有修仙的天赋而已，但我超喜欢在修仙界玩耍的，那里面个个都是人才，说话又好听，还有各种花里胡哨的特殊才华，哎哟我超喜欢里面的。”
　　修仙大佬们集体绝望:“喜欢？喜欢你提着把刀砍了半个修仙界？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/97c12194765ae564999ea5aaefdf2c85","author":"蘑菇屋下的松鼠","author_id":"","book_id":"7085357205842562078","book_name":"修仙界第一大祸害","book_short_name":"仙侠之峨眉","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8e0e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"14.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7085357423300444705","read_count":"145902","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2090907"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"930","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,东方玄幻,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/12fe5fe1187a31891c7fa7ef18bf7337~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779272755&x-signature=P1jJEpl1HVKPGLjdwdtWMV7cZ%2Bo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"465791554430317","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.06667077e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032118255410A2DE2C0A0DF2A6F8D7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读290小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":157,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":836231,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1042897,"reply_count":12,"show_pv":153816},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7143450236307424038","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"快更新啊[哭]，太喜欢这本小说了。换无垢的话说：『是一本很温柔的小说呢～』或许有些人会觉得神州和脑海中残酷的修仙界有所出入，但是这样的神州才值得诸如李明儒之辈去守护啊。个人认为，看小说能收获一份感动就足够了，没有必要死抠这合理两个字不放。（感觉小玉儿有伏笔[思考]千万别黑化…）","text_exts":[{"e":57,"s":54,"text":"修仙界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774088754F2A6F8D7%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227143450236307424038%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227085357205842562078%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BF%AE%E4%BB%99%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1663214243,"group_id":"7085357205842562078","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7AKX1o0S8FlkYVRMwCkX05iX79DpbmBD1iDyxu8v7XB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1605722251199556","user_name":"快雪时晴。"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1605722251199556","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7085357205842562078","book_info":{"abstract":"【凡人流】【无系统】与传统仙侠写法不同，不喜勿入
